events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Impact
angles.copy: It's a big birthday for Ringo Starr! From the Fab Four to his solo career, his rhythm has defined generations.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the legendary Brian May! His Red Special guitar has given us some of rock's most unforgettable riffs.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger is 83 today, proving that rock and roll truly keeps you young.

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Music TV Revolution
angles.copy: Remember when music television actually played music? Today marks the launch of MTV back in 1981.

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was originally released on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: A quarter-century on, Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' still sounds as fresh and rebellious as it did in '94. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music. Relive the magic of Woodstock.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we pay tribute to the incomparable Elvis Presley, whose music and legacy live on.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Legend Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering Jimi Hendrix today. His revolutionary guitar work continues to inspire generations.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was originally released on September 26, 1969, in the UK.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: That zebra crossing, that album. Celebrating the timeless 'Abbey Road' from The Beatles today.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude remain as powerful as ever.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that unmistakable swagger to the stage.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 24, 1975.

angles.name: A Song For Peace
angles.copy: More than just a song, 'Imagine' by John Lennon is a timeless message of peace. What does it mean to you?

events.title: First iPod released in 2001
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? Today marks the anniversary of Apple introducing the device that changed how we listen to music forever.

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! Time to celebrate 007's enduring legacy and those unforgettable theme tunes.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend, John Lennon.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to resonate.
